summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sunpreet coaching website iteration 2. All requested features working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Homepage navbar shows white text 'SUNPREET SINGH / Coaching' on hero section (rgb(251, 251, 249))
Navbar text changes to dark on scroll (rgb(28, 25, 23))
All navigation links work correctly (coaching, programs, retreats, about, contact)
1:1 Coaching page buttons properly sized and visible (no overflow)
Training Programs accordion functionality - all 5 accordions expand/collapse correctly
Retreats page shows upcoming retreats section with Bali and Sri Lanka cards
Join Waitlist modal opens correctly with retreat details and form
Waitlist form accepts input and submits successfully to backend API
Retreat gallery shows 3 past retreat cards
Retreat lightbox opens with download button functionality
Mobile navigation menu works correctly with all links accessible
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Form validation works (submit button enabled when form filled)
Modal close functionality works (Escape key and close button)
Responsive design works on mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080)
